ABOUT.HEADING: Why me
ABOUT.CONTENT:
My introduction to web development began during my training as a computer science teacher, where I gained my first experience creating websites. This sparked my interest in diving deeper into web application development.
It is important to me that web applications are clear, well-structured, and functional. I work analytically and bring a structured, methodical approach. My goal is to develop user-friendly solutions that are both visually and technically convincing.
